untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (twin-peak identification, peak height comparison, volume dome pattern measurement over 5-day windows, and triple-top discrimination) requires custom pattern recognition logic not available in the allowed indicator set. The signal relies on visual/structural pattern analysis rather than quantitative indicators. Proposed entry uses pivot level as proxy for confirmation price, but cannot encode: (1) peak-finding algorithm, (2) equal-height comparison between two peaks, (3) 5-day surrounding volume measurement and comparison, (4) triple-top detection and exclusion logic.
translation_notes: Direction and regime correctly mapped. Entry conditions partially approximated using pivot (as confirmation price proxy) and vol_ratio_20 (as volume trend proxy). Exit uses reversal above pivot. The core pattern detection mechanics cannot be expressed with allowed indicators and require custom bar pattern analysis. Success rate (72%) and average decline (19%) noted but not encoded in rules. Consider implementing as custom pattern detector outside standard indicator framework.
